LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT EUROPEAN COLLISION CENTER, LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES FAILED TO MEET AND CONFER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. THE PARTIES MERELY EXCHANGED LETTERS AND MOVANT NEVER EVEN RESPONDED TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S LETTER. (OH DECL., PARS. 1-6; LIPSON DECL., PARS. 3-4.) THE CODE REQUIRES A MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON, BY PHONE, OR VIDEO CONFERENCE. (CCP 430.41(A).) THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. THE RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY FEBRUARY 20, 2026. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT EUROPEAN COLLISION CENTER, LLC'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE IT FILED AN EXECUTED DECLARATION OF OPPOSITION CONSISTENT WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 3071. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Continued To Jul-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Prior to the hearing, the Court received an untimely notice to contest from Plaintiff's Counsel Danny Oh. During check in Counsel informs the clerk the late notice was due to a medical issue. Mr. Oh states opposing counsel Mr. Lipson is not appearing today since he has other matters. At the instruction of the Court, the matter will not be heard, will not be continued, the Court will not speak ex parte to counsel and the TR of the court will be the final ruling of the Court.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant European Collision Center, LLC's Demurrer is SUSTAINED.

Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted.

(see word minutes for full details)

Plaintiff is granted leave to amend to allege it filed an executed Declaration of Opposition consistent with Civil Code section 3071. Any amended complaint must be filed within 20 days of notice of this order.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2026 Continued To May-20-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2026 Continued To Apr-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EUROPEAN COLLISION CENTER, LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Continued on the court's motion to April 9, 2026.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EUROPEAN COLLISION CENTER, LLC DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Off calendar. The parties failed to meet and confer in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties merely exchanged letters and movant never even responded to Plaintiff's counsel's letter. (Oh Decl., pars. 1-6; Lipson Decl., pars. 3-4.) The code requires a meet and confer in person, by phone, or video conference. (CCP 430.41(a).) The parties are ordered to comply with the code. The response to the complaint is now due by February 20, 2026.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
